title: Oorellam Unnai Kandu Lyrics Nannbenda Song Lyrics
stanzas:
Oorellam unnai kandu song lyrics from Nannbenda
Singers : Unni Krishnan & Bombay Jayashree

Oorrellam unnai kandu viyandhaaraa
Unnodu kadhal solli nayandharaa.
Anbe un pinnaal yaarum alaindharaa
Kanne Nam kadhal kandu kalaindharaa.(2)

Oorellam ennai kandu viyandhaara
Ennodu kadhal solli nayandharaa

Oru murai unai kaanum pozhudhu
Iru vizhigalil roja kanavu.
Vaanaththai katti vaikka vazhigal undu ..
Naanaththai kattivaikka vazhigal illai.

Thangam vetkapattaal
manjal vannam yaarum.
Naanam kondathaale
Un vannam pon vannam
Sevvannam aachu .

Kannaa naam kannum
Kannum kalappomaa.
Kaattrodu mega thundaai
Midhappomaa.

Appappaa rekkai katti parappomaa
Aagaayaam thaandi sendru
Vasippomaa.

Sendhaen konda paalai
Vaangi vaippadhendraal
Thanga kinnam vendum.
Kaanaalaa naanthaaney
Un thanga kinnam vaa.

Oorrellam unnai kandu viyandhaaraa
Unnodu kadhal solli nayandharaa.
Anbe un pinnaal yaarum alaindharaa
Kannae Nam kadhal kandu kalaindharaa.

Oorellam ennai kandu viyandhaara
Ennodu kadhal solli nayandharaa

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song?

The song expresses deep romantic feelings and the joy of being in love, highlighting the beauty of connection between two people.

What is the context of this song in the movie?

In Nannbenda, this song signifies a pivotal moment of romance, showcasing the lead characters' emotions and their journey together.

Who are the singers of this song?

The song features the talented voices of Bombay Jayashree and Unnikrishnan, who bring the lyrics to life with their melodious rendition.

Who is the music director for this song?

The music for Oorellam Unnai Kandu is composed by Harrish Jeyaraj, known for his captivating melodies in Tamil cinema.

When was this song released?

This song was released on December 27, 2014, as part of the movie Nannbenda.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Oorellam Unnai Kandu, the romantic essence of love is beautifully portrayed through the heartfelt lyrics and soothing melodies. The song captures the emotions of longing and affection, making it a perfect backdrop for romantic moments in Nannbenda. With the harmonious blend of Bombay Jayashree and Unnikrishnan's voices, it evokes a sense of warmth and connection. This melody not only enhances the narrative of the film but also resonates deeply with anyone who has experienced love.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Oorellam Unnai Kandu from Nannbenda is a mesmerizing romantic duet that beautifully captures the essence of love. With the enchanting voices of Bombay Jayashree and Unnikrishnan, this song weaves a magical atmosphere that resonates with every listener. The collaboration under the musical direction of Harrish Jeyaraj adds a unique charm, making it a must-listen for all music lovers.
stanzaMeanings: Everyone is amazed to see you. They say love is expressed through you. No one else can compare to you, my dear. Our love is something special.
Everyone is amazed to see me. They say love is expressed through me.
When I see you for the first time, it's like a dream in my eyes. There are paths to reach the sky, but there are no paths to reach my heart.
When gold is lost, it turns yellow. Your beauty has become golden because of my love.
Shall we blend our eyes together? Shall we meet like clouds in the sky?
Oh my! Shall we spread our wings and fly? Shall we cross the sky and settle down?
You have hidden your beauty with your shyness. You have concealed your heart with your innocence.
You found me and made me bloom like a flower. You broke me like a fruit with your charm.
If I bring the right offerings, I need a golden gift. Oh, my dear, come to me with your golden gift.
Everyone is amazed to see you. They say love is expressed through you. No one else can compare to you, my dear. Our love is something special.
Everyone is amazed to see me. They say love is expressed through me.
